title: My guy Dave — confrontational friendship message draft
html:
TL;DR

  • Single-paragraph message draft to Dave — buying him concert/event tickets, demanding clarity about whether Dave's actually showing up. Wants to talk in person about "the Gavin situation" too.
  • Specimen of Yahir's pattern of writing firm, accountability-demanding messages to friends in crisis or drift. Same shape as the later 2024 04 27 sam breakup messages and the family confrontation in 2022 12 25 christmas eve 2022.
  • Tone: direct, names the void ("face whatever void"), assumes friend wants to be helped. Zero coddling.
  • "There is a possibility that they go to waste, not used, not likely though" — bluffing as social pressure. Same negotiation tactic he'd later use in 2026 01 02 diddles call / 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide (scarcity framing).

Key quotes

"you need to dial in. I will buy the tickets tonight. There is a possibility that they go to waste, not used, not likely though."

"Please just face whatever void and be transparent and tell me."

"I want to talk to you about the Gavin situation as well. I'm expecting your response soon brother"

Why it matters in the graph

  • david (Dave) already has an entity page. This adds 2nd mention with rich context about their dynamic — Yahir as the friend who buys tickets AND demands accountability simultaneously.
  • "Face whatever void" — early articulation of the void-confrontation theme that recurs through 2024 09 12 never forget and 2026 02 26 motherfucker falls backwards.
  • The "Gavin situation" — separate person/thread to track.

Open questions

  • Who is Gavin? (Recurring? First mention so far.)
  • Did Dave show up? What were the tickets to?
  • This Dave — same as the "Dave Carlsen" in 2020 04 23 go to diamond? Or different Dave (more likely a friend, given tone)?

Wikilinks
